public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as orbital omen reader.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a orbital omen reader still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of orbital omen reader in and around Planet of Wind, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Planet of Wind workable through the obligations of orbital omen reader while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Planet of Wind, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of orbital omen reader visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Vera Field can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Vera Field can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Vera Field carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Planet of Wind: the part of Planet of Wind where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
